creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Created attachment 178781
Update py-jsmin to 2.2.1

Tiny bugfix for py-jsmin, MFH-able. Changes:

* Fix infinite loop on 'return x / 1;'
* Add test case


Unit test passed, Poudriere build test passed, for:

* 11.0, amd64, Python 2.7
* 11.0, amd64, Python 3.5
* 10.3, amd64, Python 2.7
* 10.3, amd64, Python 3.5
